title: Aggregate visualizations of activities performed with respect to portions of electronic documents
abstract: A facility for annotating portions of a document shown in a visual representation of the document with annotations reflecting aggregated document activities performed with respect to the portions is described. The facility specifies a visual representation of at least part of the document. For each of at least two portions of the document that are not identical and that are represented in the specified visual representation, the facility attaches to locations in the document's visual representation corresponding to the portion a visual annotation reflecting an aggregation operation against document activities performed with respect to the portion.
claims:
Claims 1. A computing system, comprising: a processor; and a memory having contents that, when executed by the processor: generate a visual representation of at least part of a document; for each of one or more portions of the document each represented in the generated visual representation, determine an aggregation of document activities performed with respect to the portion of the document by at least one user; and cause to be included in the generated visual representation, at a location proximate to a portion of the generated visual representation corresponding to the portion of the document, an annotation that reflects the determined aggregation. 2. The computing system of claim 1 wherein the memory further has content that, when executed by the processor: cause the generated visual representation to be displayed together with the annotations. 3. The computing system of claim 1 wherein, for at least one of the one or more portions, the annotation included in the generated visual representation is directly integrated into content among contents of the portion. 4. The computing system of claim 3 wherein the annotation is of a type selected from among an annotation that imposes a visual characterization upon content, and an annotation that imposes a visual characterization on background behind content. 5. The computing system of claim 1 wherein, for at least one of the one or more portions, the annotation included in the generated visual representation is (1) positioned in a margin alongside contents of the portion or (2) included a scrollbar usable to reposition the visual representation for display. 6. A method in a computing system, the method comprising: retrieving contents of a document; using the retrieved contents to cause to be displayed a visual representation of at least part of the document; and for each of at least two portions of the document that are not identical and that are represented in the displayed visual representation, causing to be displayed in connection with locations in the document's visual representation corresponding to the 

 portion a visual annotation to the document's visual representation reflecting an aggregation operation against document activities performed with respect to the portion. 7. The method of claim 6 wherein the aggregation operations comprise one or more of count, frequency, and recency. 8. The method of claim 6, further comprising: determining that a user has performed a user interface interaction with a selected one of the annotations; and based upon the determining, causing to be displayed information involved in the aggregation operation reflected by the selected annotation. 9. The method of claim 6, further comprising: receiving user input specifying an aspect of the visual annotation, and wherein the aspect of the displayed visual annotations is consistent with the received user input. 10. A memory having contents configured to cause a computing system to: retrieve contents of a document; use the retrieved contents to specify a visual representation of at least part of the document; and for each of at least two portions of the document that are not identical and that are represented in the specified visual representation, attach to locations in the document's visual representation corresponding to the portion a visual annotation reflecting an aggregation operation against document activities performed with respect to the portion. 11. The memory of claim 10 wherein the document activities against which the aggregation operations are performed comprise one or more of authoring and editing. 12. The memory of claim 10 wherein the document activities against which the aggregation operations are performed comprise one or more of viewing, reading, and commenting. 13. The memory of claim 10 wherein the document activities against which the aggregation operations are performed comprise one or more of citation and bodily incorporation in other documents. 14. The memory of claim 10 wherein the document activities against which the aggregation operations are performed comprise one or more setting a 

 completion state, setting a business impact level, setting a sensitivity level, and setting security restrictions. 15. The memory of claim 10 wherein the document activities against which the aggregation operations are performed comprise occurrence of security events
